title: Question : Does buildah support GCP authentication with workload federation (pool) method ?
body:
Hi ! 

Sorry about this question, but before I spend endless hours trying something new, I would like to ask you : 

Does buildah support GCP authentication (for Artifact Registry) with workload identity federation (pool) method ? 

My JSON file (for auth) will be made with this command `gcloud iam workload-identity-pools create-cred-config ...`

Thanks in advance and thanks for your work !

comments.body: I don't think I understand enough about the cloud providers to say for sure.  For interacting with registries, it expects to find authentication secrets in the format described in https://github.com/containers/image/blob/main/docs/containers-auth.json.5.md.  Does that correspond to the format that your example `gcloud` command would generate?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
